sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 29:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 29:1
items.html: The measure of the coarseness in the screen in the vessel on which the upper coupling is made is called “filling,” since the vessel is filled with light because of it. (Item 56)
